$comment: Layer D for REMIT: static data-flow equivalence for the PROGRAM outputs (ACCT_ID, ROWS). The advice file's AMT/CHG/NET records are outside layer D at file I/O stage 1 - the candidate serializes them via System.out.write, which the extractor deliberately does not treat as key derivation - and are covered dynamically by layers A/B/C on every case through the file-serializing wrapper (candidate B's stale-buffer CHG line is layer B's catch).
